title: CA Jobs 2026 – Consultant
shortInfo: Delhi Electricity Regulatory Commission (DERC) Recruitment 2026 is now open for 10 Consultant posts for candidates with qualifications can Apply online applications available until 15 June 2026 through the official website of Delhi Electricity Regulatory Commission.

basic_details.short_information: Delhi Electricity Regulatory Commission (DERC) Recruitment 2026 is now open for 10 Consultant posts for candidates with qualifications can Apply online applications available until 15 June 2026 through the official website of Delhi Electricity Regulatory Commission.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the DERC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.details: Consultant (Law): Qualified LLB from a recognized University with 03 years experience preferably in commercial and civil matters labour. Consultant (HR): Recognized MBA/PGDM from a University. Minimum 03 years in Human Resources Government/PSU/State. Consultant (Tariff): Qualified CA/ICWA/MBA (Finance) full time from reputed institute/university. Experience in infrastructure/Banking/Large Audit Firms. Consultant (Civil Engg): Degree in Civil Engg from a recognized institute. Minimum 03 years experience in Technical specifications, design drawings, estimates, costing. Consultant (Elec Engg): Degree in Electrical/Power Engg from a recognized institution. Minimum 03 years experience.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DERC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for DERC Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Delhi Electricity Regulatory Commission Consultant positions is 15th June 2026. Ensure all your details are correctly entered before this deadline.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for the Consultant positions at the Delhi Electricity Regulatory Commission. These vacancies are distributed across various specializations.

faq.question: What is the application mode for DERC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the DERC Consultant recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for the Consultant (Law) post?
faq.answer: For the Consultant (Law) position, candidates must hold an LLB degree from a recognized university and possess at least 03 years of relevant experience, preferably in commercial, civil matters, or labour law.

faq.question: Is there any age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: As per the provided information, there is no specific minimum or maximum age limit mentioned for any of the Consultant posts. Age relaxation details are also not specified.

faq.question: What is the job type for these Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The Consultant positions at the Delhi Electricity Regulatory Commission are on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Where can I find the official DERC Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the DERC Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The salary details for the Consultant positions are not explicitly mentioned in the extracted data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive salary information.

faq.question: Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Delhi. It is advisable to check the official notification for specific eligibility regarding domicile or residency requirements.

faq.question: What is the selection process for DERC Consultant Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process details for the DERC Consultant Recruitment are not provided in the extracted data. Candidates should consult the official notification for information on how the selection will be conducted.
